Name: iParticleSystemMaxNumMeshVertices
Description: Limit for particle mesh vertices. range: 0-65536

Name: fParticleSystemDegradeDistance
Description: The distance at which the number of bursted particles decreases. range: 10.0-60.0

Name: fParticleSystemUpdateInterval
Description: The time during which the particles are accumulated (not burst every frame).

Name: bHasForcedParticles
Description: Allows the mod to ’force’ particles. Used if the particles are important in the module and the player should not disable them.
